name: Nike
notes: Highly selective; prioritizes athletes and high-production fitness creators; agency-mediated

name: Adidas
notes: Slightly more creator-accessible than Nike; strong in running, yoga, and street fitness

name: Peloton
collaborationStyle: home workout integration, equipment review, lifestyle story
notes: Best fit for home fitness and wellness lifestyle creators; strong female audience overlap

name: Lululemon
notes: Active ambassador program accessible to micro creators; strong yoga, pilates, and run niche fit

name: MyProtein
collaborationStyle: discount code, product gifting, affiliate, supplement review
notes: Very active sponsor in fitness space; known for generous affiliate commissions and fast approvals

name: Gymshark
collaborationStyle: workout apparel showcase, ambassador, fitness challenge
notes: Built almost entirely on creator partnerships; one of the most creator-native brands in fitness

name: Whoop
collaborationStyle: data-driven storytelling, wearable review, performance tracking
notes: Rising wearable brand; great crossover between fitness and tech/optimization creators

name: Gainful
collaborationStyle: personalized nutrition story, supplement review, routine integration
notes: Personalized protein/supplement brand; strong fit for creators focused on nutrition and body composition

name: Hyperice
collaborationStyle: recovery routine, product demo, athlete integration
notes: Recovery tech brand (Hypervolt, etc.); ideal for creators covering training, recovery, or injury prevention

name: Alo Moves
collaborationStyle: yoga/pilates integration, mindful movement, subscription demo
notes: Yoga/fitness streaming platform under Alo Yoga; strong fit for yoga, pilates, and mindfulness creators

name: Tonal
collaborationStyle: home gym showcase, strength training integration, tech review
notes: Smart home strength trainer; high CPM for the right audience — home fitness and tech-forward creators

name: Momentous
collaborationStyle: elite supplement review, performance nutrition story, science-backed segment
notes: NSF-certified sports nutrition brand used by pro athletes; ideal for serious fitness and biohacking creators

name: Lumen
collaborationStyle: metabolism tracking story, biohacking integration, product review
notes: Handheld metabolism tracker; strong niche fit for creators covering nutrition science, fasting, or metabolic health

name: Viivo
collaborationStyle: recovery product demo, soreness/injury story, athlete lifestyle
notes: Emerging recovery brand targeting everyday athletes; approachable for smaller fitness creators

name: Bala
collaborationStyle: workout integration, aesthetic fitness content, product showcase
notes: Aesthetically driven fitness accessories (weighted bangles, bars); great for yoga, pilates, and aesthetic workout creators

name: Ketone-IQ
collaborationStyle: performance drink review, cognitive/physical edge story, biohacking segment
notes: Ketone drink for mental and physical performance; niche but high CPM — ideal for biohacking, endurance, and optimization creators
